raw_consumer_statement:
I filed a complaint against XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX due to a transaction for a real estate coaching that I requested. The company did not comply with the contract and took XXXX from me. I have been trying to get my money back by contacting American Express which was the bank that I used to pay XXXX to XXXX XXXX. American Express told me that they can't help me because of their policy, i feel this is unfair when other people in my situation are getting their money back. Please I need some assistance I'm a XXXX Veteran and this situation has contributed to my condition. 


I know people who submitted their complaints here and got their money back.
